response.overview: This lavish product comprehensively celebrates the audiovisual world of OMD’s 14th studio album Bauhaus Staircase. Working in close collaboration with cine1080, the music videos for the singles from the record were the band’s most ambitious yet. Refusing on a point of principle to use any AI in their work, these videos are lovingly CGI generated and were the results of many months of labour.  In addition to all the music videos of the singles & promotional tracks released from the album, this luxurious book boasts 32 pages of imagery, a full-length conversation between Andy McCluskey and cine1080’s Andy Whitehurst about their creative working relationship, the full Bauhaus Staircase album & b-sides in high-resolution audio, the live visuals used on the Bauhaus Staircase Tour (with brand new live tracks recorded in Edinburgh and London and mixed by Paul Humphreys) plus more.
response.title: Bauhaus Staircase OMD ARTefact
